name: RSS Harvester
description: Polls RSS and Atom feeds on a schedule and publishes news.article items to the Item Bus.

ownedSettings.label: Feed URLs
ownedSettings.description: Newline-separated list of RSS or Atom feed URLs to poll.

settings.label: Feed URLs
settings.description: RSS and Atom sources polled by the worker.

fields.label: Feed URLs
fields.helpText: One URL per line. RSS and Atom formats are both supported.

routes.label: RSS
routes.description: Feed status, latest fetched items, and manual run controls.
